title: Pi Agent explained in 6min..
summary: Caleb Writes Code reviews Pi, an agent framework described as unique for its harness layer design. The video compares Pi against frontier agent products like Claude Code, Cursor, Codex, and Antigravity, examining how different products handle increasingly complex harness layers for agent capabilities.
